entries.title: Ransomware Containment and Recovery
entries.summary: Coordinate SOC, endpoint, and backup teams to isolate infected hosts, preserve evidence, and restore priority mission systems.
recommended_actions: Isolate affected network segments at the tactical edge.
Collect volatile memory and endpoint telemetry for forensics.
Restore mission-essential services from trusted offline backups.

entries.title: Credential Theft Investigation
entries.summary: Hunt for credential abuse indicators and rapidly revoke compromised accounts to prevent lateral movement.
recommended_actions: Force password reset and token revocation for impacted identities.
Enable emergency MFA enforcement for privileged accounts.
Pivot hunt through authentication logs for anomalous geolocation and impossible-travel patterns.
